content.problemStatement:
Write a program to print all prime numbers in the range [LLL, RRR].


Input Format

The first and only line of input contains two space separated integers, LLL and RRR - The start and end of the range.


Output Format

Print on a single line, all prime numbers between LLL and RRR (inclusive) in increasing order with a space between them.
content.inputFormat: First line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each test case consists of a single line containing two space-separated integers L and R (1 <= L <= R <= 1000), denoting the inclusive range.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print all prime numbers in the inclusive range [L, R] in increasing order, separated by a single space. Print an empty line if there are no primes. Output each test case result on its own line.

sampleTestCases.explanation: There is a single test case. The primes between 2 and 11 inclusive are 2, 3, 5, 7 and 11.
The range consists of a single number 11, which is prime, so it is printed.
The range contains only the number 1, which is not prime; therefore an empty line is printed.

solution.approach: We pre‑compute primality for every integer up to the maximum possible R (1000) using the Sieve of Eratosthenes. The sieve runs once in O(MAX log log MAX) time and O(MAX) memory. For each test case we simply scan the interval [L,R] and output the numbers marked prime. This yields O(R‑L+1) work per test case, which is trivial for the given limits.
solution.timeComplexity: Precomputation O(1000 log log 1000). Each test case O(R-L+1) scanning, total O(T·MAX).
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1000) for the boolean array storing primality.

code.Java: import java.io.*;import java.util.*;public class Main{private static final int MAX=1000;public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception{BufferedReader br=new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(System.in));StringTokenizer st=new StringTokenizer(br.readLine());int T=Integer.parseInt(st.nextToken());boolean[] isPrime=new boolean[MAX+1];Arrays.fill(isPrime,true);isPrime[0]=isPrime[1]=false;for(int p=2;p*p<=MAX;p++)if(isPrime[p])for(int m=p*p;m<=MAX;m+=p)isPrime[m]=false;StringBuilder out=new StringBuilder();for(int t=0;t<T;t++){String line;while((line=br.readLine())!=null&&line.trim().isEmpty());if(line==null)break;st=new StringTokenizer(line);int L=Integer.parseInt(st.nextToken());int R=Integer.parseInt(st.nextToken());boolean first=true;for(int i=L;i<=R;i++)if(isPrime[i]){if(!first)out.append(' ');out.append(i);first=false;}out.append('\n');}System.out.print(out.toString());}}
